name: Host-Internal: MCP Tool Call Emission
description: Host-internal smoke fixture for the Postgres reference host. Exercises core.mcp.toolCall against the conformance suite's synthetic MCP fake server so the smoke test can assert canonical agent.toolCalled + agent.toolReturned emissions per run-event-payloads.schema.json §agentToolCalled / §agentToolReturned. MCP-1 invariant: arguments + result body NEVER appear on event payloads — only SHA-256 digests + length. NOT loaded by the conformance suite — only by the postgres-host test/fixtures-private path via OPENWOP_EXTRA_FIXTURES_DIR.
